title: CAM Engineering and Construction Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Ordered by the Federal Court to pay a $250,000 penalty for allegedly failing to become a member of the Energy and Water Ombudsman NSW scheme, in breach of the National Energy Retail Law — a consumer-access-to-redress compliance matter.
scope: Ordered by the Federal Court to pay a $250,000 penalty for alleged failure to join a mandatory ombudsman scheme under the National Energy Retail Law
